title: Find Or Create Group based on a column
excerpt: Hi! I have a scenario where a new item is being created via Zapier into the workspace. I need to then FIND OR CREATE a Group based on a column. Zapier doesn’t seem to have the “find a group” just “create a group” and Mon…

posts.author: growwithjen (Jen Rudd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I have a scenario where a new item is being created via Zapier into the workspace. I need to then FIND OR CREATE a Group based on a column. Zapier doesn’t seem to have the “find a group” just “create a group” and Monday.com automations don’t seem to have the “find or create” function. Any workarounds to arrive at this? The groups follow a standard convention, but items could be grouped in an existing group or a new group needs to be created.

Thanks so much!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @growwithjen! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
